sprints.name: Proof of Value
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 1: Prove platform ROI to existing studio clients. Every item here makes the value of the platform undeniable — growth tracking, impact attribution, shareable proof, and delivery notifications.

items.title: ROI dashboard (Growth+)
items.notes: Shipped — Organic traffic value (GSC clicks × CPC), ad spend equivalent, page breakdown table. GET /api/public/roi/:wsId. Growth+ only tab.

items.title: Self-service tier upgrade via Stripe
items.notes: Shipped — plan_growth/plan_premium product types, Stripe Checkout for tier upgrades, webhook auto-upgrades tier, all mailto links replaced. Fixed: tier changes now broadcast workspace:updated via WebSocket so client dashboards update in real-time without page refresh.

items.title: Churn prevention signals
items.notes: Shipped — 6h scheduler: no-login-14d, chat-dropoff, no-requests-30d, health-drop, trial-ending, payment-failed, high-engagement. Admin API: list, per-ws, dismiss.

items.title: Usage tracking + limits
items.notes: Shipped — server/usage-tracking.ts: per-workspace monthly counters for ai_chats, content_briefs, strategy_generations. Per-tier limits (free: 3/1/0, growth: 50/10/3, premium: unlimited). checkUsageLimit + incrementUsage wired into strategy gen, brief gen (both endpoints), and client chat. Unified GET /api/public/usage/:wsId endpoint. 429 responses with upgrade prompts.

items.title: Production Stripe keys (live payments)
items.notes: Shipped — stripe-config.ts: AES-256-GCM encrypted on-disk persistence for Stripe keys + product Price IDs. StripeSettings.tsx admin UI for key management. clearTestModeCustomerIds() auto-cleans on startup when using live keys. Webhook handler production-ready.

items.title: Real-time tier sync to client dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — Admin workspace updates and Stripe tier upgrades were not propagating to client dashboards in real-time. Fix: broadcastToWorkspace for admin update + initStripeBroadcast for Stripe webhooks + workspace:updated handler in ClientDashboard.tsx.

items.title: ROI month-over-month growth tracking
items.notes: Shipped — roi.ts: ROI history snapshots saved to data/roi-history/, loadHistory/saveSnapshot/computeGrowthPercent compares current value to ~30-day-old snapshot (15-45 day window). ROIDashboard.tsx: third hero card now shows MoM growth % (teal for positive, amber for negative) with fallback to Pages Tracked when no history exists yet.

items.title: SEO change impact tracking
items.notes: Log every SEO change with timestamp → track GSC/GA4 before/after → show impact: 'After updating meta title on /services, CTR improved +124%.' Hardest thing for competitors to replicate. Infrastructure exists: trackSeoEdit timestamps + audit snapshots + getPageTrend daily GSC data.

items.title: Shareable client reports
items.notes: Monthly reports already generate full HTML via renderReportHTML(). Add hosted permalink route (/report/:wsId/:reportId) + one-click 'Share this report' button. Clients forward to decision-makers. Reduces churn (budget-holders see value) + referral channel.

items.title: Content published email notification
items.notes: Shipped — content_published EmailEventType + renderContentPublished template in email-templates.ts. notifyClientContentPublished in email.ts. Wired into PATCH /api/content-requests/:wsId/:id when status='published'. Branded email with topic, target keyword, and dashboard CTA.

items.title: Content refresh / decay engine
items.notes: Monitor published content performance via handleContentPerformance → flag decaying posts (clicks drop >30% over 60 days) → AI refresh recommendations → approve → republish. Justifies ongoing subscription.

items.title: Work order real-time broadcast
items.notes: Shipped — broadcastToWorkspace(wsId, 'work-order:update', ...) added to PATCH /api/work-orders/:wsId/:orderId. WORK_ORDER_UPDATE added to ws-events.ts registry. Client dashboard now receives real-time work order status updates.

sprints.name: Revenue Expansion
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 2: New revenue streams from existing infrastructure. Expand what existing studio clients can buy, add agency resale, and track platform revenue.

items.title: Client onboarding wizard
items.notes: Shipped — 3-step guided first-run (welcome → tour → actions). Tier-aware feature grid, suggested actions based on connected data.

items.title: "What happened this month" summary
items.notes: Shipped — MonthlySummary component. Removed from client overview in declutter pass (redundant with InsightsDigest).

items.title: Content performance tracker
items.notes: Shipped — getPageTrend, /api/content-performance/:workspaceId, ContentPerformance.tsx with GSC+GA4 per-post data.

items.title: AI anomaly detection
items.notes: Shipped — anomaly-detection.ts: 28-day period comparison for GSC+GA4+audit. 12h scheduler. Admin+public APIs. AnomalyAlerts in WorkspaceHome (admin).

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy. Configurable branding (logo, colors, favicon, email sender, chatbot persona). Agency resale tiers ($299-999/mo). New revenue stream.

items.title: Recurring content subscriptions
items.notes: Monthly content packages: '4 posts/mo from strategy gaps → generate → approve → publish.' Content pipeline fully built. Add Stripe subscription product + scheduler. Transforms content from transactional to recurring. $500-2K/mo additional recurring per client.

items.title: Auto-publish to Webflow CMS
items.notes: Brief → AI generates → client approves → one-click publish to CMS collection. Already have Webflow CMS write access (PATCH collections/:id/items/:id). Gap is markdown → Webflow rich text formatting. Killer differentiator — no competitor goes from brief to live on site.

items.title: Strategy & implementation hours system
items.notes: Premium includes 3 strategy & implementation hrs/mo. Additional hours: $200/hr ad-hoc, $175/hr 5-hr block, $150/hr 10-hr block. Scoped to SEO execution. Hour tracking, usage dashboard, Stripe add-on products.

items.title: Platform revenue dashboard in Command Center
items.notes: Admin-only revenue dashboard: total MRR, revenue by workspace, revenue by product type (tiers, content, fixes, hours), MoM growth chart, payment history. Data from payments.ts + Stripe. Visible in Command Center settings area.

sprints.name: Self-Service & Growth
sprints.rationale: PRIORITY 3 (deferred until market rollout): Remove admin bottleneck and enable client acquisition at scale. Execute after proving value with existing studio clients.

items.title: AI chatbot: multi-modal responses
items.notes: Shipped — Rich fenced code blocks in AI chat: metric, chart, datatable, sparkline. ChatBlocks.tsx + RenderMarkdown + RICH_BLOCKS_PROMPT.

items.title: Self-service Webflow connection onboarding
items.notes: OAuth Webflow App for zero-instruction client connection. Conditional OnboardingWizard step. Prerequisite for Marketplace listing.

items.title: GSC/GA4 self-service OAuth connection
items.notes: Client connects Google Search Console and GA4 via OAuth consent screen. Phase 2 of self-service (Phase 1 = Webflow).

items.title: Admin onboarding / first-run experience
items.notes: 7-step checklist on empty command center: create workspace, link Webflow, connect GSC, connect GA4, run audit, set client password, configure email. Progress bar, dismissable.

items.title: Webflow App Marketplace listing
items.notes: Register as official Webflow App → appear in Marketplace → one-click install. Zero-cost distribution channel. Depends on OAuth (#100).

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events (audit complete, content delivered, payment received, chat session). Enables automation integrations.

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens. Required for white-label clients on mobile.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Admin UX Overhaul
sprints.rationale: Admin dashboard UX pass. P0 and P1 items shipped. P2 polish items moved to backlog.

items.title: Collapsible sidebar navigation groups
items.notes: Shipped — Accordion sidebar groups with localStorage persistence.

items.title: Cross-workspace command center enhancements
items.notes: Shipped — Global anomaly banner, priority-sorted attention items, workspace card anomaly badges.

items.title: WorkspaceHome section extraction
items.notes: Shipped — workspace-home/: SeoWorkStatus, ActivityFeed, RankingsSnapshot, ActiveRequestsAnnotations.

items.title: Admin notification bell / global alert badge
items.notes: Shipped — NotificationBell.tsx in sidebar utility bar. Polling every 5min.

items.title: Spotlight / command palette (⌘K)
items.notes: Shipped — CommandPalette.tsx with fuzzy search, keyboard navigation.

items.title: Workspace quick-switch breadcrumb
items.notes: Shipped — Breadcrumb bar with workspace dropdown.

items.title: Client overview page declutter
items.notes: Shipped — Removed AnomalyAlerts, AI Hero Insight, MonthlySummary from overview. Filtered Recent Work timeline. InsightsDigest is single source of insight.

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Prioritize when a specific client need or revenue opportunity justifies it.

items.title: Multi-competitor analysis
items.notes: Compare against 2-3 competitors simultaneously

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Pull crawl errors from GSC to seed redirect scanner

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Track audit score over time per-page, not just site-wide

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages

items.title: Competitor historical comparisons
items.notes: Track competitor gap over time

items.title: Competitor keyword overlap
items.notes: Show shared keywords and where you win/lose

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only)

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Downloadable prospect reports with agency branding

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Verify Lucide tree-shaking, audit chart libs

items.title: Sales report: CRM integration
items.notes: Push prospect data to HubSpot/Pipedrive when a report is generated

items.title: Schema generator → gpt-4o upgrade
items.notes: CONDITIONAL: One-line model change in schema-suggester.ts. Blocked by 30K TPM limit on current OpenAI org tier. Switch when tier reaches 200K+ TPM on gpt-4o.

items.title: AI-powered internal linking engine
items.notes: Scan all pages → AI identifies contextual linking opportunities → generate anchor text → preview → one-click implement via Webflow API. Ongoing orphan page detection. Agencies charge $500-2K for a one-time audit; we do it continuously.

items.title: Predictive SEO & trend forecasting
items.notes: Historical GSC data + Google Trends API + seasonal patterns → predict growing keywords 30-90 days out → proactive content recommendations. Forward-looking vs competitors' backward-looking tools.

items.title: Cross-client benchmarking network
items.notes: Anonymized benchmarks across all clients. 'Your health score of 78 is top 25% for your size.' Creates network effects — every new client makes data more valuable. Needs 20+ active clients.

items.title: Backlink intelligence & outreach
items.notes: Ahrefs/Moz API integration → backlink profile → link gaps vs competitors → AI outreach templates → campaign tracking. Biggest current blind spot. Managed link building add-on $500-2K/mo.

items.title: Local SEO module
items.notes: GBP integration, local keyword tracking, citation monitoring, local competitor analysis, review monitoring, LocalBusiness schema. 46% of Google searches have local intent. Add-on $99-149/mo.

items.title: AI strategy memory & learning
items.notes: AI learns from conversations, approved changes, rejected suggestions. Understands which topics perform, what gets approved, client priorities. Creates proprietary knowledge asset — switching cost becomes enormous.

items.title: Client team collaboration
items.notes: Comments on strategy items, @mentions on briefs, shared notes, assignment workflows. Multiple team members = higher switching cost. Per-seat pricing opportunity.

items.title: WordPress / Shopify support
items.notes: Abstract CMS integration layer for WordPress REST API and Shopify Admin API. Same AI strategy + content engine, different publishing endpoint. WordPress is 43% of CMS market vs Webflow ~1%. Only after Webflow PMF proven.

items.title: Embeddable SEO widgets
items.notes: Embeddable site health badge, traffic counter, 'Powered by' footer. Every client site becomes a lead gen channel. Passive referral generation at scale.

items.title: Automated competitive monitoring
items.notes: Monthly competitor audit, alert on improvements. Moved from Sprint C.

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite team members, manage roles, assign workspaces. Needed when hiring/contracting. Moved from Sprint E.

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals, member can't delete workspaces. Moved from Sprint E.

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content briefs to specific writers. Moved from Sprint E.

items.title: Content calendar
items.notes: Visual calendar of content in production with due dates. Moved from Sprint E.

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency. Moved from Sprint E.

items.title: Sidebar tool descriptions / tooltips
items.notes: Hover tooltips on sidebar items. Moved from Sprint G.

items.title: WorkspaceHome data freshness indicators
items.notes: Last updated timestamps, stale data warning. Moved from Sprint G.

items.title: Consistent back navigation patterns
items.notes: Contextual back link, lightweight nav stack. Moved from Sprint G.

items.title: AdminChat improvements
items.notes: Resizable panel, dock mode, adopt ChatPanel.tsx. Moved from Sprint G.

items.title: Dark/light mode polish for admin
items.notes: Audit admin components for light-mode rendering. Moved from Sprint G.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Quick Wins
sprints.rationale: No-brainer items: one-line changes, inject existing data into existing features, and small guards. Ship in a single session.

items.title: SEO audit AI → gpt-4o-mini cost savings
items.notes: Switched seo-audit AI recommendations from gpt-4o to gpt-4o-mini. ~17x cost reduction per audit.

items.title: Content brief: GA4 page performance injection
items.notes: GA4 landing page data (sessions, bounce rate, engagement, conversions) now injected into brief generation prompt when GA4 is connected.

items.title: Concurrent background job limits
items.notes: hasActiveJob guard on 7 job types: seo-audit, schema-generator, keyword-strategy, bulk-compress, bulk-alt, bulk-seo-fix. Returns 409 with existing jobId.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — UX/Architecture Cleanup
sprints.rationale: Address structural debt, eliminate feature duplication, and improve maintainability. Findings from comprehensive UX/UI audit of both dashboards.

items.title: Add ErrorBoundary wrappers around major sections
items.notes: Shipped — ErrorBoundary.tsx component with retry button. Wrapped: Admin main content area, AdminChat, WorkspaceHome InsightsEngine. Client: MonthlySummary, InsightsDigest, InsightsEngine (overview + health), HealthTab, ROIDashboard.

items.title: Break ClientDashboard.tsx into tab-level components
items.notes: Shipped — Extracted all 8 tabs into src/components/client/: OverviewTab, SearchTab, AnalyticsTab, ContentTab, StrategyTab, ApprovalsTab, RequestsTab, PlansTab. ClientDashboard reduced from 3265→1536 lines. Each tab internalizes its own state and helpers.

items.title: Unify client Approvals + Requests + Content into Inbox tab
items.notes: Shipped — Created InboxTab.tsx composing ApprovalsTab, RequestsTab, ContentTab with filter bar (All / SEO Changes / Requests / Content). Unified badge count on tab bar. Replaced 3 separate nav entries with single Inbox tab. Updated Overview action banners to navigate to inbox.

items.title: Slim down client Overview tab
items.notes: Shipped — Removed site health compact card and InsightsEngine from Overview sidebar. Overview now: welcome + action banners + metrics + monthly summary + insights digest + quick questions + activity timeline.

items.title: Remove WorkspaceHome All Tools grid
items.notes: Shipped — Removed All Tools SectionCard and quickLinks array from WorkspaceHome. Cleaned up unused imports (ExternalLink, Image, Gauge, Share2, Swords).

items.title: Split SeoAudit into standalone route components
items.notes: Shipped — Each SEO sub-tool (Editor, Strategy, Redirects, InternalLinks, Schema, ContentBriefs, Competitors, RankTracker) now routes directly from App.tsx. SeoAudit only handles the core audit view. Removed view prop, 8 lazy imports, SubToolFallback, and view-based routing block.

items.title: Extract shared data-fetching hooks
items.notes: Shipped — useAuditSummary(wsId), useSearchData(wsId, days), useGA4Overview(wsId, days) in src/hooks/. Module-level 60s cache, same pattern as usePageEditStates. Wired useAuditSummary into WorkspaceHome. ClientDashboard can adopt incrementally.

items.title: Unify chat into shared ChatPanel component
items.notes: Shipped — ChatPanel.tsx: shared message bubbles, loading dots, input bar, quick questions, teal/purple accent theming. Wired into SearchConsole (~90 lines replaced). AdminChat and ClientDashboard can adopt incrementally.

items.title: Merge client Analytics + Search into unified Performance tab
items.notes: Shipped — Created PerformanceTab.tsx with internal Search/Analytics sub-tabs. Updated ClientDashboard nav, URL params (backward-compat ?tab=search/analytics → performance). All setTab references updated across InsightsDigest, OnboardingWizard.

items.title: Suppression-aware health score recalculation
items.notes: Shipped — applySuppressionsToAudit() helper filters suppressed issues and recalculates page+site scores using same weights as seo-audit.ts. Wired into all 6 data exit points: /api/public/audit-summary, /api/public/audit-detail, /api/reports/:siteId/latest, admin chat context, client chat context, strategy chat context. Suppressed issues no longer appear in any dashboard score, issue list, or AI recommendation.

items.title: SEO edit tracking — teal=live, purple=in-review, yellow=flagged
items.notes: Shipped — seoEditTracking on Workspace model (Record<pageId, {status, updatedAt, fields}>). trackSeoEdit() helper with priority-based status (won't downgrade live→flagged). CRUD + public API endpoints. Auto-wired into 4 flows: SEO save→live, CMS save→live, approval submit→in-review, audit run→flagged. Frontend: SeoEditor colored borders + badge pills + status legend, CmsEditor tracking badges on item rows, SeoAudit tracking borders + badges on page cards. All components optimistically update local state.

items.title: Hide non-sitemap collection pages from content editor + parent slug
items.notes: Shipped — Server fetches sitemap.xml, filters collection items to only those with a matching sitemap URL. Falls back to showing all if sitemap unavailable. Frontend displays full path with parent collection slug (e.g., /locations/houston-midtown instead of /houston-midtown).

items.title: Real-time data updates via WebSocket/SSE
items.notes: Shipped — WebSocket workspace subscriptions: clients send {action:'subscribe',workspaceId} to receive scoped events. Server: broadcastToWorkspace() sends to subscribed clients only. activity-log.ts auto-broadcasts 'activity:new' on every addActivity call via initActivityBroadcast callback. Explicit events: approval:update, approval:applied, request:created, request:update, content-request:created, content-request:update, audit:complete. Frontend: useWorkspaceEvents hook (subscribe/unsubscribe/reconnect). Wired into WorkspaceHome (activity, requests, content, audit) and ClientDashboard (activity, approvals, requests, content, audit). ~4h actual.

items.title: Shared RankTable component
items.notes: Shipped — src/components/shared/RankTable.tsx: positionColor helper, RankHistoryChart (SVG), RankTable (configurable columns), RankChange indicator, RankTrackingSection (chart+table combo). Wired into SearchTab replacing inline implementation.

items.title: Inline AI proactive insight on Overview
items.notes: Shipped — AI hero insight card on Overview with loading state, 'Continue in chat' CTA. Fetches executive summary via fetchInlineInsight for paid tiers.

items.title: Restructure Overview hierarchy
items.notes: Shipped — Overview now: welcome → AI hero insight → action banners → key metrics → monthly activity → insights digest + sidebar.

items.title: Strategy-specific summary cards
items.notes: Shipped — Replaced duplicate Search metrics with Keywords Tracked, Content Gaps, Quick Wins, Not Yet Ranking. Cleaned up unused imports.

items.title: Health tab errors-only default
items.notes: Shipped — Page breakdown defaults to 'error' filter when errors exist. Added page count indicator (X of Y pages).

items.title: Contextual search benchmarks
items.notes: Shipped — Qualitative labels on all 4 Search Health Summary metrics: 'Strong visibility', 'Above average', 'Needs attention', etc.

items.title: ROI teaser on Plans tab
items.notes: Shipped — Free-tier users see ROI teaser card with Traffic Value / Ad Spend Saved / Content ROI preview icons above contact CTA.

items.title: Compact Content Opportunities cards
items.notes: Shipped — Tighter padding, truncated topic, inline pageType+intent badges, 2-line clamped rationale. CTA buttons more prominent.

items.title: Fix Plans 'Ask AI Advisor' CTA
items.notes: Shipped — CTA now calls onOpenChat to open the AI chat directly instead of navigating to Overview.

items.title: AI chat maximize button
items.notes: Shipped — Toggle button in chat header expands from w-96/max-h-500 to w-[600px]/max-h-[700px] with smooth transition. Close resets to compact.

items.title: Group Plans features by category
items.notes: Shipped — Features grouped into FeatureGroups with category headers: Starter (Insights & Data / AI & Tools / Strategy & Content), Growth (Strategy & SEO / Content & ROI / Premium Only), Premium (Competitor Intelligence / Managed SEO / Technical & Content).

items.title: Beta client dashboard (feature flag)
items.notes: Shipped — /client/beta/:workspaceId route with betaMode prop. BetaContext + useBetaMode() hook. Hides: Plans tab, ROI tab, trial badges/banners, upgrade/pricing/Stripe modals, SeoCart, chat usage limits, purchase buttons on fix recommendations + content opportunities. Override effectiveTier to premium. Single codebase — no duplication.

items.title: Beta-safe AI chatbot prompts
items.notes: Shipped — betaMode flag passed to /api/public/search-chat. Conditional system prompt swaps REVENUE HOOKS for BETA RULES: never mention purchasing/pricing/plans/upgrades, frame content gaps as topics not products, collaborative recommendations with hmpsn studio. Skip chat rate limiting in beta. Stronger guardrails: no hallucinated data, no timeline promises, never contradict team.

sprints.rationale: Fastest path to visible client value and upsell potential. No dependencies.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEO Fix Monetization
sprints.rationale: Technical SEO product pricing overhaul and multi-item checkout flow. Clients can now purchase fixes directly from audit results.

items.title: Technical SEO product pricing restructure
items.notes: Shipped — Alt text → $50 flat full-site. Metadata → $20/page or $179/10pg pack. Schema → $39/page or $299/10pg pack. Redirect → $19/redirect. Removed uncapped 'fix all' options. Product keys renamed: schema_site→schema_10, fix_meta_sweep→fix_meta_10. Updated PRODUCT_MAP, StripeSettings defaults, MONETIZATION.md.

items.title: Multi-item SEO fix checkout flow
items.notes: Shipped — useCart hook (localStorage persistence, context provider), SeoCart slide-out drawer (items, quantities, pack upsells, Premium nudge at $500+), FixRecommendations component (maps audit issues to purchasable fixes with smart pricing), OrderStatus component (post-purchase fulfillment tracking), createCartCheckoutSession for multi-item Stripe sessions, /api/stripe/cart-checkout endpoint, /api/public/fix-orders/:wsId endpoint. CartProvider wraps ClientDashboard, SeoCartButton in header.

items.title: Lead generation landing page
items.notes: Shipped — Public-facing page at hmpsn.studio explaining the platform with free trial CTA.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Dashboard UX Phase 1: Quick Wins
sprints.rationale: Reduce cognitive load on first impression and improve Inbox actionability. Findings from comprehensive client dashboard UX audit.

items.title: Remove duplicate metrics from MonthlySummary
items.notes: Shipped — Stripped metric highlight cards (Visitors, Clicks, Impressions, Site Health) from MonthlySummary since they duplicated StatCards on Overview. MonthlySummary now shows only activity/work done (content requests, briefs delivered, requests completed, SEO batches applied). Removed unused imports and props.

items.title: Personalize Welcome header with dynamic subtitle
items.notes: Shipped — Welcome header now shows client's first name ('Welcome back, Josh') and a dynamic subtitle derived from the most significant data signal: traffic trend, search clicks trend, or site health score. Falls back to generic 'Here are your latest insights'. Added clientUser prop to OverviewTab.

items.title: Add empty states for all Inbox filter views
items.notes: Shipped — Added empty states for Requests filter ('Submit a request and your team will respond here'), Content filter (tier-aware messaging), and All filter ('Your inbox is empty'). Previously only Approvals filter had an empty state.

items.title: Hide data-less tabs for free-tier users
items.notes: Already done — NAV array conditionally includes Strategy, Inbox, and ROI tabs only for paid tiers (isPaid check). No code change needed.

items.title: Add status chips to Inbox section headers
items.notes: Shipped — Inbox 'All' view section headers now show actionability status: 'Waiting on you · N' (amber) for pending approvals and content reviews, 'Team replied · N' (amber) for requests with unread team notes, 'In progress · N' (blue) for active items, 'All reviewed' (green) when no pending approvals.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Recommendation Flags & Editor Enhancements
sprints.rationale: Surface AI recommendations inline in editors, add schema editing, and wire InsightsEngine navigation.

items.title: Direct JSON editing in Schema Generator
items.notes: Shipped — Edit toggle, editable textarea with JSON validation, edited schemas used in copy/publish/bulk-publish flows

items.title: Recommendation flags in SEO Editor + Schema Generator
items.notes: Shipped — useRecommendations hook, amber badge counts per page, expandable banners with title/insight/traffic-at-risk/priority

items.title: InsightsEngine in Workspace Home with click-through
items.notes: Shipped — Compact InsightsEngine embedded in WorkspaceHome, onNavigate prop with REC_TYPE_TAB mapping, Fix → buttons route to correct editor tool

items.title: Audit context in SEO rewrite prompts
items.notes: Shipped — /api/webflow/seo-rewrite looks up latest audit snapshot, injects page-specific issues (title, description, H1, duplicates) into AI prompt

items.title: Schema gen workspaceId cost tracking
items.notes: Shipped — workspaceId added to SchemaContext, passed through callOpenAI for per-workspace token cost attribution
